title: Litsea utilis
taxonomy: Litsea utilis is classified within the family Lauraceae, which is a large and diverse family of flowering plants commonly known as laurel or lauraceae family. This family is part of the order Laurales, a group of flowering plants that are mainly evergreen trees or shrubs. The order Laurales is a distinct group within the larger clade of flowering plants known as angiosperms. The Lauraceae family is thought to have originated over 80 million years ago during the Cretaceous period. Litsea utilis is a specific species within this family, with its classification reflecting its evolutionary relationships with other members of Lauraceae.
